reviews.review_description:
The game isn’t as bad as people make it seem. I’ve been playing it for a couple of months now, and it’s actually super fun. Don’t get me wrong. the graphics are lowkey mid, but I’m not expecting too much considering this is on the Quest 3S.

Anyone who’s played Hitman on PC or console would know this game is easily fun to play. My only concerns? Not enough updates and not enough new maps. I don’t really blame them considering the backlash they received, but for anyone who enjoys a decent stealth shooting game, it’s more than enough. If they would add freelancer with 5 maps  as a dlc I’d def cop it 

I didn’t pay for it, and I probably wouldn’t spend more than $5 on it but if they start updating it, who knows how good this game could becom

One thing I’ve been thinking is if we can get the creators of the hitman games and get them to create more hitman operations that you can do and like put some more in there so we can have more stuff to do on there instead of just a couple like instead of this last one, they should add a couple more, not games but assassinations operations

￼
Love the game love gameplay great graphics BTW maybe not that good also enemies are fine love the game wish there were more guns more mechanics that abouts it love thr game overall tho

I love the Hitman series enough that I would have supported the growth of this game. Sadly, the developer BAILED on the game entirely, and has done nothing to improve the gameplay, features - anything at all. You ought to refund every single buyer for this mess.
this game was worth my time, and is faithful to the original game, but there are so many parts that they cheaped out on. original game is much better.

reviews.review_title: If you’re a fan of Hitman get this!
reviews.review_description: For those that are graphic snobs there is much to be desired on that part. But if you are a fan of the Hitman franchise and gameplay you’ll love this flaws and all. I loved my time with this game and wish there was more missions (there are quite a few by the way) I just didn’t want it to end.

Honest review. If you like Hitman games and you have a quest 3 then get this. Yes psvr 2 is better because it plays from an actual gaming console you doughnuts but this is a standalone VR platform that it's playing from. They did a good job rendering it to the quest. Maybe they could do better but it's solid. Games fun.

I don’t know what everyone was crying about this game is pimp. It’s fun to play , i think they did a great job on this game . The shooting is a bit adrift but you can manage.  Other than the going along the edge of the wall being slow and glitchy somewhat. I’d say it’s a great build that needs a few minor adjustment if possible.

This game is fun as hell.  There is a ton of awesome work in this game.  Detailed environments. Dialogue makes you laugh and enhances immersion.  You can choose many ways to get the job done and it is never a dull moment.  Just get creative and time flies.

Graphically and functionally it is missing a few things and yes it needs more polishing others have noted, but here is where it shines- there is so much replay ability compared to other games!  I support and encourage updates to what is easily the bones of the best.

Hitman is a solid franchise of games and I am a big fan.  This has the feel of the others, but in first person AND dual wielding.  My only hope is they give it the same love they give other versions and also let us mod and build our own contracts...

Thanks for an amazing game.  You deserve that 5 stars if we can please have those updates!  Keep those fiber wires crossed!
Alot of fun and quite the stress reliever

What a shame. Such a good game and they made it look like trash. Had this game for over a year and nothing new. No graphic updates or anything I meen atleast give us the dlc maps. Atleast make us feel like our purchase was appreciated. Y’all betrayed us worse then big smoke and Ryder did to Cj
its a good game but its abandoned

Ok hitman reload it’s not the best Ofc u need a PCvr or whatever but playing it on the vr is not bad it’s Realy good u got lots of missions u can do u have to be very sneaky one wrong move your done and Yh it’s just a really good game trust me buy it

I spent $30 on this game just to only get to the mission “end of an era” and when I loaded back in the next day, my game was so glitchy it powered my headset off while I could still hear sound before that it was laggy and so glitchy in ways I can’t even explain it kept pulling up menus, turning my screen to black it was just annoying as hell I don’t know what to do, but I’m probably about to delete it ￼ and I know it’s not my headset because it’s only a year old and it’s a Meta quest 3S so I know it has to be the game ￼￼

reviews.review_title: Was this a high school project?
reviews.review_description:
I loved this game on console. This vr rendition is trash. It plays like a bunch of high schoolers got together to learn to code and make a game. Literally every action you make has at least one glitch to it. Some items like the garrote are so glitchy you can't even use them. Some actions you take, like climbing, the screen literally goes black while you take them because they obviously didn't want to invest the time to render the action. 
It's a waste of $30. Since I'm a fan of the franchise, if it's on sale for $5 that's about what id pay for it if I had a choice. This game is an embarrassment to the companies who made it. I can't even believe they thought it was a good idea to release it. I'm in shock

This game is NOT great BUT its NOT bad. I am a fan of Hitman and this is not what I was expecting. Here is a list of things that annoy me in it

1. No manual reload

2. Graphics (I mean its a quest port)

3. If you bump into an NPC even a little they get MAD.

4. Graphics 

5. Lack of Hitman 1 or 2 being here

6. Grabbing NPC and items suck

7. When climbing you cant see hands

8. Levels feel small for some reason

9. Lack of picking up items (You can only pick up weopons on the map that it)

This game falls along the lines of ‘Grid: Legends’ to me. I Didn’t purchase Grid for a year and a half due to the poor reviews. And when I did, WOW…what a great game. Same with this one. Sure the graphics aren’t great but they’re not horrible. And it’s a fun experience as all Hitman games are.

reviews.review_title: Graphic sucks but game isn’t bad.
reviews.review_description: OK, so everyone talked about how terrible the graphics are on this game. And the first two missions with the cardboard cut outs in the graphics is terribly rough. But it sets me in the mindset of like a PlayStation 2 but I’m in the game. I grew up with terrible graphics so I guess that doesn’t kill me completely with the rest of the game. It has a few few glitches here and there. The automatic reload and press pressing a to open doors doesn’t give you the true VR, VR feel. ￼ But if you lower your expectations and think of it as a retro game remake in an old-school VR headset setting. The game is not bad. I enjoy doing all the little side quest. Sneaking up behind the guards and killing them. Solving mysteries. Being an assassin super sleuth.. I gotta say I enjoyed it despite its limitations. Yes, they could’ve did better but they did pretty good. Definitely a solid three stars from this fanboy of the entire franchise. Do better though there’s no reason why this one feels like PlayStation 2 when we’re in the VR error that’s so far beyond Nintendo’s Virtual Boy.
The game is really buggy, sure… but for fans of hitman it’s pretty awesome
the is bad like 31$ for what. Like you cant make a move with out a lag or it crashed

The consle edition was amazing but this was made in a dumpster, it had to be. Whenever i play this game it feels like my vr is running on mashed potatoes, and Grey's voice... It sounds like an ai. I played Dubai and holy $#1% it was GODAWFUL. I really had to smell my vr to make sure it wasn't running on potatoes. IOI did great on consle, whenever i play on my Xbox i feel like im sitting in a throne instead of a gaming chair. Please don't by the game.

1, this sh*t looks like you didn't even try, you can't even grab everything. What a waste of money,  I would get the Pcvr/PSVR2 versions if I had enough money for that and HITMAN WOA, I would play hardbullet and BONELAB other than this slop. And I def wouldn't buy it for 30 dollars because this is sh*t, also we need manual reload options bruh, rtx options, and full body options because it would be better. And overall this looks like an unfinished version of HITMAN WOA VR, so buns ngl. like the devs be treating the Quest 3 and Quest 3s like babys, i'm sure that the quest 3 can handle good graphics. 2, where are the rest of the maps? There's only 5 missions, and 4 tutorials. This game should be at least 5-10 dollars because I don't even think that the devs tried. Like if it had options for full body, rtx, and manual reload options this game wouldn't be getting trashed on. And it would be cool if we could carry the outfits in bags. 3, I wouldn't recommend buying this, should have looked at the reviews first.

It's absolutely awful. The graphics I wouldn't mind, the performance would be fine, but the VR implementation is an absolute joke. Reloading a gun is a button press, not actually reloading, grabbing a gun on the ground next to a body is insanely difficult until you move the body first, because interaction is based on your player position and NOT your hands, which is insanity in VR. Ladders barely function, all UI is clearly flat screen just displayed flat, you cannot look at text because all text moves with your head, etcetcetcetc. It's an absolutely awful useless port. What a huge wasted opportunity...

reviews.review_title: If you enjoy the Hitman franchise
reviews.review_description: Ok, despite all the bad reviews saying this and that, the game isn’t inherently bad. It’s definitely a fun title to pick up if you enjoy the Hitman 3 game and love VR. But there is one thing I found while playing that kinda made it boring. That is the amount of content presented in the game. You can’t play any Hitman 1 or 2 missions in this game. You also don’t have featured contracts or contracts at all, elusive targets, or any way to carry progress from say a console to the VR port. But other than that, and a few bugs when doing certain actions (and the graphics for some), the game is pretty fun and enjoyable to play. So overall, get it if you enjoy Hitman 3. If not, maybe put your money elsewhere.
